name: Doughnuts- Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first six ingredients in the bread pan. Add water. Close the cover and place dry yeast in the yeast holder. Select BASIC DOUGH MODE. Press start (Breadmaker completes the basic dough mode in 2 hours and 25 minutes).
2. Divide the dough into 12 equal portions. Roll each portion into a ball.
3. Place on a lightly floured surface. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 20 minutes.
4. Shape each ball as desired, in a ring, twisted, or oval shape. Place on a greased baking pan.
5. Proof at 90°F for 30 minutes or until nearly doubled.
6. Deep fry the doughnuts in 360°F oil until golden brown. Let cool.
7. Garnish with your choice of toppings.
8. If desired, cut a hole on one end of the doughnut and fill with jelly or your favorite filling.
